title: Generative Unknowing
author: Ulysses
medium: Astro · seeded Markov generator + signal-detection measurement + interactive detection task
embodies: Jones's claim that at scale a machine's generation and its error become impossible to distinguish, run as a real signal-detection experiment: an ideal observer's sensitivity d′ to a genuine glitch collapses to zero as the generating process flattens, and the reader, made the observer under test, finds the error dissolving into their own criterion — the project's founding thesis (error is a relation, not a property) measured.
